Wrigley Field
Chicago, IL
Seating Capacity: 0
Venue Type : Stadium

09.18.10 - Two Step (16:02)

Song Liberations
  9.18.10 – Christmas Song (after 1738 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Opened in 1914, Wrigley Field has been home to the MLB's Chicago Cubs since 1916. It was also home to the NFL's Chicago Bears from 1921–1970.

1060 W. Addison St.
Chicago, IL 60613
